title: Code Coverage Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on code coverage analysis.

questions.question: Regarding the measurement of code coverage, what does it actually track?
options: The percentage of your code that is executed during a unit test run
The number of users of your code

questions.question: Which of these is a popular JavaScript tool used to measure and report code coverage?
What is a key benefit of using code coverage analysis on your project?
options: To identify which components of your code are and aren't being tested
To make your local machine faster
